title: [codereview] CCP-17 Zephyr coap_status.c map_count validation before CBOR header
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:271 - map_count calculated and header emitted before buffer capacity validation per CCP-17 and appendix-bufferbloat. Can lead to invalid CBOR with mismatched count if overflow in nested structures. Must validate upfront, return ENOBUFS. Tag: codereview
